descriptions.description: The 3ml clear plastic lotion bottle with a snap cap suits sample sizes for hand cream and body lotion. Skincare and personal care brands use this for trial sizes and promotional packaging. Lightweight and cost-effective for samples.
A 30ml clear lotion bottle for hand cream and body lotion formats. Skincare and personal care brands choose this for travel and trial sizes. The bottle shape suits pump and flip-top closures.
